tangent_segment_length_from_center_dista: What is the length of tangent segment AB?
Find the length of the common tangent segment AB.
Using the labeled radii and center distance, determine AB.
The segment from A to B is marked with ?. What is its length?
What is the value of the tangent length AB?
center_distance_from_tangent_segment_len: What is the distance CD between the two circle centers?
Using the labeled radii and tangent segment, determine CD.
The segment from C to D is marked with ?. What is its length?
What is the value of the center distance CD?

scene:circle_pair_tangents_scene.object_description: two separated non-concentric circles with centers C and D, a common tangent touching them at A and B, radii to the tangent points, and an auxiliary right triangle CED whose leg ED shows the radius difference
